kept.text: இந்த தேர்தல் மூலமாக ஒன்னு நன்றாக தெரிகிறது. Instagram, Facebook & WhatsApp influence. I am bullish on $META

Meta Platforms Inc. acquired Assured Robot Intelligence, a startup specializing in artificial intelligence models for robotics.

The deal is a cornerstone of Meta's major initiative to develop its own humanoid technology.

Assured Robot Intelligence is described as a frontier firm focused on "robotic intelligence," specifically enabling robots to understand, predict, and adapt to human behaviors within complex, dynamic environments.

tweet.text:
🔥 TOP 10 US STOCKS TO BUY IN MAY 2026 | HIGH-GROWTH STRATEGY
Expert Picks | Strong Buy Signals | Catalyst-Driven

🚀 1. Meta Platforms (META) – AI & Social Dominance
Strategy: Core Tech Holding, Long-Term Growth
Why Buy:
Unmatched AI integration across Instagram, WhatsApp, and Facebook.
2026 Q1 earnings beat with 28% YoY revenue growth.
Massive $40B+ buyback program approved.
Upside: 35–40% | Risk: Moderate

🛡️ 2. CrowdStrike Holdings (CRWD) – Cybersecurity Leader
Strategy: Secular Growth, Defensive Tech
Why Buy:
First cybersecurity firm to hit $5B annual recurring revenue (ARR).
AI-powered threat detection gaining enterprise market share.
95%+ gross margins with predictable subscription model.
Upside: 45–50% | Risk: Moderate-High

💳 3. Affirm Holdings (AFRM) – BNPL Fintech Disruptor
Strategy:
 High-Risk, High-Reward Catalyst Play
Why Buy:May 12 investor day expected to reveal new AI features.
Undervalued vs. peers despite 40% YoY transaction growth.
Expanding partnerships with Amazon, Walmart, and Shopify.
Upside: 60%+ | Risk: High

🩺 4. UnitedHealth Group (UNH) – Healthcare Giant
Strategy: Defensive Dividend, Stable Growth
Why Buy:
Raised 2026 full-year guidance after strong Q1.
1.4% dividend yield with 13 consecutive years of increases.
Optum tech division driving 20%+ growth in healthcare services.
Upside: 20–25% | Risk: Low

☁️ 5. Atlassian (TEAM) – Cloud Collaboration King
Strategy: SaaS Compounders, Recurring Revenue
Why Buy:
Jira/Confluence dominant in enterprise project management.
Cloud migration accelerating with 35% YoY revenue growth.
"Strong Buy" consensus (20 Buys, 3 Holds).
Upside: 55% | Risk: Moderate

📈 6. Klaviyo (KVYO) – AI E-Commerce Marketing
Strategy: Mid-Cap AI Growth
Why Buy:
AI personalization tools boosting customer retention for brands.
Morgan Stanley initiates Buy with $34 target (52% upside).
25%+ YoY growth with expanding profit margins.
Upside: 52% | Risk: Moderate-High

tweet.text: $GOOGL $META $AMZN $MSFT stocks after releasing Q1 earnings last week. https://t.co/CJOXhcdYI8

韦德布什证券 Wedbush Securities 全球科技研究主管丹·艾夫斯（Dan Ives）最近的一次快问快答核心内容。#AI $META $NVDA $GOOGL $MSFT $MU $ORCL $TSLA 
主持人： 准备好了吗，丹？ 丹·艾夫斯： 好的，开始吧。
大科技财报季用一个词形容？ 丹：当然是看涨（Bullish）。

$META  还是微软？ 丹：微软 $MSFT 。
云端王者是微软还是谷歌？ 丹：谷歌 $GOOGL 
英伟达 $NVDA  ，是加仓还是获利了结？ 丹：加仓。
财报后最值得持有的Mag7股票？ 丹：谷歌。
目前最被低估的Mag7股票？ 丹：微软。这次抛售几乎是跳楼大甩卖。

目前最被炒作的AI股票？ 丹：我没看到特别被高估的AI股票（Pass）。
Micron还是Intel？ 丹：Micron $MU 
Oracle还是IBM？ 丹：Oracle $ORCL  ，但我仍然喜欢IBM。
Salesforce还是ServiceNow？ 丹：这里选Salesforce，但我也很喜欢ServiceNow。
一个没人讨论的中盘AI股票？ 丹：Pegasystems（佩格系统）。
如果只能投一个IPO：SpaceX、Anthropic还是OpenAI？ 丹：它们都会成功，但SpaceX会是定义类别的公司。
未来12个月最大的AI赢家？ 丹：电力（Power）。
Alphabet还有上涨空间吗？有多大？ 丹：有，还有30-40%的上涨空间。
玩AI最好的单一方式，一个名字？ 丹：英伟达（AI教父）。

谁拥有最好的AI战略？ 丹：目前是谷歌。Gemini在消费端表现突出，资本支出也在全力推进。
Palantir现在还是买点吗？ 丹：它会在未来2-3年内达到1万亿美元市值。Palantir在软件领域的地位，就像英伟达在芯片领域的地位一样。

Tesla $TSLA 什么时候能看到回报？ 丹：今年夏季到秋季，随着Robotaxi规模化，会出现转机。SpaceX的IPO对Tesla也是利好。
软件股如何应对波动？ 丹：ServiceNow被超卖、Salesforce被超卖、Workday也可以说是被超卖。Oracle在未来12-18个月有翻倍潜力。
SoundHound AI是 sleeper 还是 hype？ 丹：不是炒作，是真实策略，只是需要执行到位。我们长期看好。

tweet.text:
$AMD| Analysts forecasts are all wrong 🧵

Even UBS at $455, they modeled AMD at 
$49B FY2026
$75B FY2027
$95B FY2028

Most other analysts are at $40-$45B for FY2026. 
They are still excluding $MSFT $META @OpenAI $ORCL @LumaLabsAI $AMZN $GOOGL XAI G42 and many more. The demand for EPYC Turin and Venice are off the chart, estimated to be more than 20m units due to explosive Agentic AI demand. 

Dr. Su secured the 2nm allocation, Memory and customers, yet...

We know so far Dr. Su said Helios rack is on track to deliver in H2 2026, so 2-2.5GW is easily 
$40-$50B at conseravtive point. 

When we exclude $40-$50B, which is nonsense
$AMD will still going to do $40-$45B, could be higher if AMD could secure more EPYC Turin and Venice. 

Like I said, most analysts are still using old and false new "Delay" from SemiAnal to model AMD. 

Months ago, before @OpenAI raised $122B+, they would pound on OpenAI can't fund the first GW. Now OpenAI has roughly $170-$200B Cash, yet they still excluded OpenAI revenue out. 

On $META, it has $81.2B cash and $115.8 Operating Cash Flow, so for fuck sake, META can fund multi-GW deployment. 

AMD has the worst coverages than all other semi stocks for more than a decade. They have no idea how to understand TSMC 2nm Ramp roadmap. I will link it below. 

I understand AMD only guide quarter by quarter, but contracts are already announced, analysts don't have to be this stubborn until last minute. 

Now you know what I been calling them out.

Not Financial Advice!

quoted_tweet.text:
$AMD Comprehensive Q1 2026 Earning Preview🧵

@AMD  is set to release its fiscal Q1 2026 results on May 5, 2026 after market close. AMD guides Quarter by quarter, so the inflection Q3 will be guided in Q2 2026 ER or August.

AMD Guidance: $9.8B (±$300 million)

Wall Street Consensus:
Revenue $9.8-$9.88B 
Adjusted EPS $1.28-$1.30

My Expectation:
Revenue $10.3-$11B 
Adjusted EPS $1.30-$1.40

Analysts Price Targets so far:
UBS $455 | Buy Rating
Melius Research $375
DA Davidson $375| Buy Rating
Sussquehanna $375| Positive 
Wells Fargo $345| Overweight

Investors/Analysts will watch:
~H2 2026 Helios Shipment and ramp 
~Explosive Agentic AI demand for EPYC Turin and Venice
~CPUs demand for older gen as reported that customers demand is so high they are buying 2022-2023 EPYC Gen
~Potential Large customer announcement
~China potential revenue or progress on export licenses
~TSMC allocation and supply management
~CPU:GPU Ratio shifted from 1:4-8 to 3-5:1. Management comment on this whether CPUs dense custom racks are being placed. 
~Custom Chips progress like $MSFT HBv 
~Progress on "Local AI" chips for B2C Laptop/PC

“Agentic AI” (autonomous AI agents capable of multi-step reasoning, planning, and tool use) is emerging for AMD as it has the best CPUs(Turin) and EPYC Venice will widen the innovative Gap even further. Beyond traditional generative AI training/inference. Unlike pure LLM inference (GPU-heavy), agentic workloads require significant CPU orchestration for sequential decision-making, tool calling, and hybrid compute. AMD’s strong position in both EPYC server CPUs and high-memory Instinct GPUs (MI300/MI350/MI455 series) positions it well to gorw EPS(Non-GAAP) to $12-$17.

Not Financial Advice!
